full_text:
Wang Song 王松
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Song (王松)was born in Yuyang commandery. Convinced by Liu Fang to join forces with Cao Cao against the Yuans. Wang Song was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
